```bash cURL

  <JSON_RPC_URL> \
  -H 'content-type: application/json' \
  --data @- <<'EOF'
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "id": 1,
  "method": "setConfiguration",
  "params": {
    "params": {}
  }
}
EOF
```
